question: Which segment holds the largest share in the final year shown?

options.A: Cannot determine which segment holds the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.B: The green area (Segment C) holds the largest share.
options.C: The purple area (Segment A) holds the largest share.
options.D: The orange area (Segment B) holds the largest share.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
